message:
test(conformance): differential harness for dirent.h vs glibc

CONFORMANCE: libc dirent.h diff matrix.

4 functions, 7 tests. DIR* handles are layout-incompatible between
FrankenLibC and glibc, so each impl walks the SAME tempdir end-to-end
and we compare the SET of (d_name, d_type) tuples (order is
implementation-defined per POSIX).

- empty_directory: both must yield empty set (excluding . and ..)
- mixed_directory: 3 regular files + 2 subdirs + 1 symlink; entry
  set + d_type bytes must match
- many_entries: 200 files (exercises getdents pagination)
- special_names: hidden/double-dot/spaces/punctuation/uppercase/digit-
  prefix entries
- rewinddir_replays_walk: open → walk → rewinddir → walk again must
  yield the same set on both impls
- opendir_missing_path: NULL + same errno

0 divergences observed.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
